steps.title: Identify the series structure
steps.content: Three towns form a series in the sentence: the first (represented by the blank), Ayem, and Jamame. These are coordinate noun items.

steps.title: Apply the comma-in-series rule
steps.content: In a series of three or more coordinate items, a comma separates each item except the last: “Item1, Item2, and Item3”. The choice Maseno, correctly applies this rule for the first item in the series. Choices A, B, and C either omit the comma, apply a colon (which introduces lists only after independent clauses), or use a semicolon (which separates independent clauses or complex list items). That matches choice D — D is correct.
